_readme: Classification DB for the media library. category: final|test|pending|hidden. bestOf: shows on public /gallery. platforms: where/when published. Pages regenerate at deploy via scripts/vercel-postbuild.mjs. Pending items show Approve/Reject buttons that open prefilled GitHub issues.

2026-07-17-jersey-squid-water-gap-final-.title: Didn't Even Need The Words Right
2026-07-17-jersey-squid-water-gap-final-.caption: "Told it 'Water Gap, food somewhere, don't care' — it still built the whole route. Didn't even need the words right."

2026-07-12-route23a-kaaterskill.jpg.title: Route 23A, Kaaterskill Clove
2026-07-12-route23a-kaaterskill.jpg.caption: Route 23A up through Kaaterskill Clove is one of those roads where the switchbacks do all the talking. TwoTired scores every route for curviness before you roll out, so "twisty" isn't a guess — it's a number.

2026-07-12-litchfield-bmw-v2-final-916.m.title: My Kind of App (v2)
2026-07-12-litchfield-bmw-v2-final-916.m.caption: "Told it: Litchfield Hills, fuel stop halfway. Route came back eighty-two percent twisty. Didn't even round. My kind of app."

2026-07-12-litchfield-navapp-final-916.m.title: My Kind of App — duplicate take, superseded by v2
2026-07-12-litchfield-navapp-final-916.m.caption: Duplicate render from the same Flow script as the v2 take. Never submitted for approval separately — Ivan approved litchfield-bmw-v2 (via GitHub issue #4) which was published instead. Kept as a test asset, not published.

2026-07-12-litchfield-bmw-final-916.mp4.title: Litchfield BMW take — REJECTED
2026-07-12-litchfield-bmw-final-916.mp4.caption: Rejected by Ivan 2026-07-12 (via media-library REJECT issue #3): motorcycle morphs at the beginning of the video. Needs a fully static locked-off shot. This file was generated by the scheduled task's own run this morning but never got a publish-log entry, so it never showed as tracked pending — fixed by this commit.

2026-07-10-manhattan-rush-hour-final-916.title: No Thanks, Midtown
2026-07-10-manhattan-rush-hour-final-916.caption: "Every app I've tried drags me through Midtown at rush hour. TwoTired took one look and said no thanks."

2026-07-09-nyack-live-tracking-final-916.title: Order Another Coffee
2026-07-09-nyack-live-tracking-final-916.caption: "Bear Mountain run. Two of 'em are still crossing the Tappan Zee — I can watch 'em crawl. Order another coffee."

2026-07-09-diner-oldtimer-v2-final-916.m.title: Forty Years, One Download
2026-07-09-diner-oldtimer-v2-final-916.m.caption: "This app already knew Storm King... even knew this diner. Took me four decades. Took the kid one download."

2026-07-08-diner-oldtimer-final-916.mp4.title: Forty Years, One Download — v1, REJECTED
2026-07-08-diner-oldtimer-final-916.mp4.caption: Rejected by Ivan 2026-07-08: bike morphs between camera pans. Replaced by v2 (locked shot).

2026-07-06-gas-station-skeptic-final-916.title: The Gas Station Skeptic
2026-07-06-gas-station-skeptic-final-916.caption: "He literally TALKED to his route app. Two more hours of twisties, end at a diner. And it just... did it."

2026-07-07-hawks-nest-dad-final-916.mp4.title: Hawk's Nest, Find Barbecue on the Way
2026-07-07-hawks-nest-dad-final-916.mp4.caption: "Route. Ribs. Done. My kids think I'm cool again."

2026-07-05-ray-talks-maps-169.mp4.title: Ray Talks About Maps
2026-07-05-ray-talks-maps-169.mp4.caption: "I hate being wrong." — Ray tries TwoTired

2026-07-06-gas-station-skeptic-916.mp4.title: Gas Station Skeptic — raw clip, no outro

twotired-vs-calimoto-manhattan.png.title: Same Ride, Two Apps
twotired-vs-calimoto-manhattan.png.caption: Brooklyn to Hawk's Nest: Calimoto goes straight through Midtown. TwoTired takes the Hudson out — like any NYC rider would.
